name: Sloppy Joe Variation
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat with the onions, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
2. Pour the liquid ingredients over the drained meat.
3. Mix well to combine all flavors.
4. Serve as a quick supper for an interesting new flavor experience.
5. Note that the moisture level may vary between batches, resulting in either juicier or dryer meat.
